name: Dudley Eppel's Hot Cider-Cranberry Punch
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine cider, cranberry juice, cinnamon, cloves, and orange peel in a large pot. Bring to a boil over medium-high heat. Reduce heat and simmer uncovered for 25 to 35 minutes.
2. Line a strainer with cheesecloth and strain the punch into individual mugs. Add 1 to 2 tablespoons of rum to each mug, then fill to the rim with hot punch.
